message:
✨ Expand widget export with AI cards and remove token requirement (#521)

* 🐛 Remove unnecessary API token from widget exports

Widgets connect to the local agent (localhost:8080) so no auth token
is needed. The user already has access by running locally.

- Remove Authorization header from generated widget code
- Update setup instructions to mention agent must be running

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Expand widget registry with more REST-based cards

Add AI Offline Detection and many other REST-based cards to the
desktop widget export feature:

- console_ai_offline_detection: Detects offline nodes and unavailable GPUs
- console_ai_health_check: AI-powered cluster health analysis
- namespace_overview: Namespace resource summary
- event_summary: Aggregated event counts
- warning_events: Warning-level events
- storage_overview: PV and storage class overview
- pvc_status: Persistent Volume Claim status
- network_overview: Network policies and services
- service_status: Kubernetes services and endpoints
- operator_status: Installed operators status
- opencost_overview: Cost allocation data
- active_alerts: Currently firing alerts
- helm_releases: Helm release status
- provider_health: AI and cloud provider status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -267,9 +267,7 @@ export function WidgetExportModal({ isOpen, onClose, cardType, mode: _mode = 'pi
  • Move to ~/Library/Application Support/Übersicht/widgets/
    • -
  • - Add export KC_API_TOKEN="your-token" to ~/.zshrc -
    • +
  • Ensure KC agent is running locally on port 8080
  • Restart Übersicht

@@ -122,6 +122,156 @@ export const WIDGET_CARDS: Record<string, WidgetCardDefinition> = {
     defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 200 },
     category: 'workload',
   },
+  // AI/Console cards
+  console_ai_offline_detection: {

+    category: 'monitoring',
+  },

+    category: 'monitoring',
+  },
+  // Namespace cards

+  },
+  // Events cards
+  event_summary: {

+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 30000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 220, height: 160 },
+    category: 'monitoring',
+  },
+  warning_events: {

+    displayName: 'Warning Events',
+    description: 'Warning-level events that need attention',
+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/mcp/events'],
+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 30000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 200 },
+    category: 'monitoring',
+  },
+  // Storage cards
+  storage_overview: {
+    cardType: 'storage_overview',
+    displayName: 'Storage Overview',
+    description: 'Persistent volume and storage class overview',
+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/mcp/storage'],
+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 60000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 180 },
+    category: 'cluster',
+  },
+  pvc_status: {
+    cardType: 'pvc_status',
+    displayName: 'PVC Status',
+    description: 'Status of Persistent Volume Claims',
+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/mcp/pvcs'],
+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 60000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 180 },

+  },
+  // Network cards
+  network_overview: {
+    cardType: 'network_overview',
+    displayName: 'Network Overview',

+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 60000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 180 },
+    category: 'cluster',
+  },
+  service_status: {
+    cardType: 'service_status',
+    displayName: 'Service Status',
+    description: 'Kubernetes services and endpoints',
+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/mcp/services'],
+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 30000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 180 },
+    category: 'cluster',
+  },
+  // Operator cards
+  operator_status: {
+    cardType: 'operator_status',
+    displayName: 'Operator Status',
+    description: 'Status of installed Kubernetes operators',
+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/mcp/operators'],
+    supportsTheme: true,
+    minRefreshInterval: 60000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 250, height: 180 },
+    category: 'workload',
+  },
+  // Cost cards
+  opencost_overview: {
+    cardType: 'opencost_overview',
+    displayName: 'OpenCost Overview',
+    description: 'Cost allocation data from OpenCost',

+    minRefreshInterval: 300000,
+    defaultSize: { width: 280, height: 200 },

+  },
+  // Alerting cards
+  active_alerts: {
+    cardType: 'active_alerts',
+    displayName: 'Active Alerts',

+    apiEndpoints: ['/api/alerts'],
+    supportsTheme: true,

+  // GitOps cards
+  helm_releases: {

+  // Provider health

 }
 
 // Stat blocks that can be exported as mini widgets
